title: Fabric Kotlin Extensions
description: Additional Kotlin libraries for Fabric mods
body:
This mod includes additional Kotlin libraries to use alongside [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin).

Libraries currently added:
- Kotlin Scripting JVM
- Kotlin Scripting JVM Host
- Kotlin Scripting JSR223
- Kotlin Scripting Dependencies Maven
- Kotlin Compiler
- Tiny Remapper (Only supplied before Minecraft 26.1)
- Mapping IO (Only before Minecraft 26.1)
- Kotlin Metadata JVM


The list of libraries may grow in the future.


Just like Fabric Language Kotlin, any mods depending on this must NOT include the mod, especially since the Kotlin compiler is included in this mod, which makes up for such a large file size.
